op.text: Priya: Friendship repaired as of 2025-06-08 after conflict over loan request; Dana apologized for abrupt delivery, Priya apologized for withdrawn response; both agreed not to mix money and friendship; Dana found regional arts infrastructure grant for Priya's studio buildout and helped with application (due end of June 2025); attended pottery class together 2025-06-04; relationship restored
[as of 2025-06-08] Jogging increased to thirty minutes; ankle recovery progressing; goal remains pain-free running by fall
[as of 2025-06-08] Boat restoration nearly complete: hull caulked and painted on the Dorothy Jean; close to water-ready, aiming for launch summer 2025

2025-06-08: On the nearly-restored Dorothy Jean: 'the Dorothy Jean's hull is caulked and painted. She's close. Like, actually-in-the-water-this-summer close. I keep standing back and looking at her and getting a lump in my throat.' (2025-06-08)
